While the high APY percentage should trigger attention, the lack of visual content (chart, graphic, or image) and the complexity of the value proposition—requiring readers to understand multiple incentive layers and a less-known reinsurance industry connection—created friction that prevented the post from breaking through to broader engagement despite solid view count.

# Why This Tweet Underperformed

The tweet fails to generate engagement because it leads with **problem-listing rather than emotional hooks or curiosity gaps**—the five-point breakdown feels like a feature list rather than something that compels shares or clicks. Additionally, the claims lack specificity (no metrics on fee potential, time savings, or performance comparisons) and the audience is narrow (only appeals to active LP managers already aware of these pain points), limiting viral potential despite addressing a real friction point in DeFi.
